mapper.select: SELECT cm.USER_ID AS studentId, m.USER_NAME AS studentName, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(a.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absentCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(a.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lateCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(a.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS earlyCnt, (SELECT LN.ATND_NOTE_CN FROM ( SELECT A2.ATND_NOTE_CN FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE A2 WHERE A2.STD_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND TRIM(A2.ATND_TYPE_CD) IN ('02', '03', '04') ORDER BY A2.ATND_REG_DT DESC ) LN WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS lastNote, (SELECT LT.STATUS FROM ( SELECT CASE TRIM(A3.ATND_TYPE_CD) WHEN '02' THEN 'ABSENT' WHEN '03' THEN 'LATE' WHEN '04' THEN 'EARLY_LEAVE' END AS STATUS FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE A3 WHERE A3.STD_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND TRIM(A3.ATND_TYPE_CD) IN ('02', '03', '04') ORDER BY A3.ATND_REG_DT DESC ) LT WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS lastType, MAX(CASE WHEN TRIM(a.ATND_TYPE_CD) IN ('02','03','04') THEN a.ATND_REG_DT END) AS lastNoteDt FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = cm.USER_ID LEFT JOIN STUDENT_ATTENDANCE a ON a.STD_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' GROUP BY cm.USER_ID, m.USER_NAME ORDER BY m.USER_NAME

SELECT CASE TRIM(ATND_TYPE_CD) WHEN '02' THEN 'ABSENT' WHEN '03' THEN 'LATE' WHEN '04' THEN 'EARLY_LEAVE' END AS atndType, ATND_REG_DT AS atndRegDt, ATND_NOTE_CN AS note FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE WHERE STD_USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRIM(ATND_TYPE_CD) IN ('02', '03', '04') ORDER BY ATND_REG_DT DESC
